title: Expanded Depths
description: A datapack that expands the build depth to -1024
body: Have you ever thought to yourself "Wow, mining is a ton of fun! But I sure wish I could go deeper than -64" Well now you can! With Expanded Depths you can no go all the way to -1024, that's 16 times deeper than vanilla. It would take a diamond pick over an hour to mine a 2*2 hole all the way from the surface to bedrock.
